query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO responses (
            id,
            author_name,
            mail,
            author_id,
            body,
            thread_id,
            board_id,
            ip_addr,
            authed_token_id,
            created_at,
            client_info,
            res_order
        ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
